config.title: Wind Speed
Gas Level

settings.markdownTextPattern:
Device Connectivity
Status
Last Activity${Last Activity}
Last Connect${Last Connect}
Last Disconnect${Last Disconnect}
settings.markdownCss: .label { font-weight: 400; font-size: 16px; line-height: 21px; letter-spacing: 0.2px; color: #424242; } .value { padding: 4px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; line-height: 21px; letter-spacing: 0.2px; color: #212121; } .title { font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; line-height: 21px; letter-spacing: 0.2px; color: #212121; } .value-block { height: 100%; } .active { border-radius: 6px; background: #303F9F; color: #E8EAF6; } .inactive { border-radius: 6px; background: #F5F5F5; color: #757575; }

dataKeys.name: lastActivityTime
dataKeys.label: Last Activity
dataKeys.postFuncBody: var friendlyTime = moment(value).format('DD.MM.YYYY HH:mm'); return friendlyTime;

dataKeys.name: lastConnectTime
dataKeys.label: Last Connect
dataKeys.postFuncBody: var friendlyTime = moment(value).format('DD.MM.YYYY HH:mm'); return friendlyTime;

dataKeys.name: lastDisconnectTime
dataKeys.label: Last Disconnect
dataKeys.postFuncBody: var friendlyTime = moment(value).format('DD.MM.YYYY HH:mm'); return friendlyTime;
